name: M4_01b_Receipt_Processor_V2_MX02
description: Verarbeitet eingescannte Belege und extrahiert Rechnungsdaten (Betrag, Datum, Lieferant)

parameters.text:
Analysiere diesen Beleg/Rechnung und extrahiere alle Informationen.

SCHRITT 1: Lieferant identifizieren
- Name wie auf Beleg
- Kurzcode (z.B. "HORN" für Hornbach, max 4 Zeichen, nur Großbuchstaben)
- Typ: BAUMARKT, GROSSHANDEL, FACHHANDEL, TANKSTELLE, RESTAURANT, SOFTWARE, SONSTIGE

SCHRITT 2: Kostenkategorie bestimmen
- MATERIAL: Baumärkte, Baustoffhandel, Werkzeug, Fliesen, Sanitär, Elektro
- SUBCONTRACTOR: Handwerker-Rechnungen, Subunternehmer
- VEHICLE_FUEL: Tankstellen
- VEHICLE_RENTAL: Autovermietung, Parken
- VEHICLE_REPAIR: Werkstatt, Autowäsche
- ENTERTAINMENT: Restaurant, Café, Bewirtung
- SOFTWARE: IT-Dienste, Apps
- OFFICE: Bürobedarf, Telefon
- DISPOSAL: Entsorgung
- OTHER: Alles andere

SCHRITT 3: Rechnungsdaten
- Rechnungsnummer (oder "UNKNOWN")
- Datum (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Nettobetrag (summe_netto) als Zahl — die Summe OHNE MwSt.
- Bruttobetrag (summe_brutto) als Zahl — die Endsumme MIT MwSt. (der höhere Betrag)
- MwSt-Satz (meist 19)

WICHTIG: summe_brutto ist IMMER der ENDPREIS (der höchste Betrag auf der Rechnung).
summe_netto ist die Summe VOR der MwSt. Es gilt: summe_brutto = summe_netto * (1 + mwst_prozent/100)

SCHRITT 4: Zahlungsinformationen
- IBAN (falls auf Rechnung, sonst "")
- BIC (falls vorhanden, sonst "")
- Zahlungsziel in Tagen (aus Text wie "zahlbar innerhalb 14 Tagen" - falls nicht angegeben: 14)
- Fälligkeitsdatum (Rechnungsdatum + Zahlungsziel, Format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Skonto Prozent (falls angegeben, sonst 0)
- Skonto Tage (falls angegeben, sonst 0)

SCHRITT 5: Positionen (maximal 20)
Für jeden Artikel:
- artikel_nummer (falls vorhanden, sonst "")
- beschreibung (wie auf Beleg)
- internal_name (kleinbuchstaben, ohne Marke, normalisiert)
- menge als Zahl
- einheit (Stk, kg, m, m², l, Pack)
- einzelpreis_brutto als Zahl
- kategorie (z.B. Elektroinstallation, Sanitär, Werkzeug, Baustoffe)

AUSGABE: Nur JSON, keine Backticks, kein Markdown, keine Erklärung.

{"lieferant":{"name":"Musterfirma GmbH","code":"MUST","typ":"GROSSHANDEL"},"expense_category":"MATERIAL","rechnung":{"nummer":"R-2025-001","datum":"2025-01-15","summe_netto":100.00,"summe_brutto":119.00,"mwst_prozent":19},"zahlung":{"iban":"DE89370400440532013000","bic":"COBADEFFXXX","zahlungsziel_tage":14,"faellig_am":"2025-01-29","skonto_prozent":2,"skonto_tage":7},"positionen":[{"artikel_nummer":"12345","beschreibung":"Beispielartikel","internal_name":"beispielartikel","menge":1,"einheit":"Stk","einzelpreis_brutto":100.00,"kategorie":"Sonstiges"}]}

parameters.query:
-- Step 1: Try to find supplier by alias
WITH alias_match AS (
  SELECT s.id, s.supplier_code, s.default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers s
  JOIN supplier_aliases sa ON sa.supplier_id = s.id
  WHERE LOWER(sa.alias_name) = LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}')
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 2: Try to find by short_name or code
name_match AS (
  SELECT id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers
  WHERE (
    LOWER(short_name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR LOWER(name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR supplier_code = '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}'
  )
  AND is_active = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 3: Create new if not found
new_supplier AS (
  INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_code, name, short_name, supplier_type, default_expense_category, is_active)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_typ }}'::supplier_type,
    '{{ $json.expense_category }}'::expense_category,
    true
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM name_match)
  ON CONFLICT (supplier_code) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
)
-- Return the matched or created supplier
SELECT 
  COALESCE(am.id, nm.id, ns.id)::text AS supplier_id,
  COALESCE(am.supplier_code, nm.supplier_code, ns.supplier_code) AS supplier_code,
  COALESCE(am.default_expense_category, nm.default_expense_category, ns.default_expense_category) AS default_expense_category,
  CASE 
    WHEN am.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'alias_match'
    WHEN nm.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'name_match'
    ELSE 'created'
  END AS match_type
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN alias_match am ON true
LEFT JOIN name_match nm ON true
LEFT JOIN new_supplier ns ON true;

-- UPSERT: Insert oder Update wenn Duplikat
INSERT INTO purchase_invoices (
  id,
  invoice_number,
  supplier_id,
  invoice_date,
  subtotal_net,
  vat_percent,
  status,
  pdf_storage_path,
  project_id,
  notes,
  due_date
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.invoice_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.rechnung_nummer }}',
  '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.supplier_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.rechnung_datum }}'::date,
  {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.summe_netto }},
  {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.mwst_prozent }},
  'DRAFT'::purchase_invoice_status,
  '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.storage_path }}',
  NULL,
  'Automatisch erfasst aus: {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.original_filename }}',
  '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.due_date }}'::date
)
ON CONFLICT (supplier_id, invoice_number) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  updated_at = now(),
  notes = purchase_invoices.notes || ' | Duplicate scan ignored'
RETURNING id::text, invoice_number, (xmax = 0) as is_new_record;

INSERT INTO purchase_invoice_items (
  invoice_id,
  position_number,
  raw_article_number,
  raw_description,
  quantity,
  unit,
  unit_price_net
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.invoice_id }}'::uuid,
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.position_number }},
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.article_number }}',
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.description }}',
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.quantity }},
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.unit }}',
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.unit_price_net }}
)
ON CONFLICT (invoice_id, position_number) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text;

INSERT INTO events (
  project_id,
  event_type,
  payload,
  source_system,
  source_flow
)
VALUES (
  NULL,
  'PURCHASE_INVOICE_CREATED',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'invoice_id', '{{ $('📄 Create Invoice').first().json.id }}',
    'invoice_number', '{{ $('📄 Create Invoice').first().json.invoice_number }}',
    'supplier_code', '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.supplier_code }}',
    'supplier_match_type', '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.match_type }}',
    'total_gross', {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.summe_brutto }},
    'expense_category', COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.default_expense_category }}', ''), '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.expense_category }}'),
    'positions_count', {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.positionen_count }},
    'needs_assignment', {{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.needs_assignment }},
    'original_filename', '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.original_filename }}',
    'queue_id', '{{ $('📋 Parse JSON').first().json.queue_id }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M4_01b_Receipt_Processor'
)
RETURNING id::text;

nodes.name: 📧 Build MX_02 Request
nodes.notes: V2: Uses invoice_date instead of new Date()

nodes.name: ✅ Move to VERARBEITET

parameters.text:
=❌ *Beleg-Verarbeitung fehlgeschlagen*

📎 {{ ($items('🔒 Claim Next').find(i => i.json.queue_id) || $items('🔒 Claim Next')[$items('🔒 Claim Next').length-1]).json.file_name }}
🔄 Versuch: {{ ($items('🔒 Claim Next').find(i => i.json.queue_id) || $items('🔒 Claim Next')[$items('🔒 Claim Next').length-1]).json.attempt_number }}/3

⚠️ Wird automatisch erneut versucht

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO products (
  name,
  supplier_id,
  sku,
  last_price_net_eur,
  last_price_date,
  unit,
  category,
  source,
  source_reference
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.description }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.product_sku }}',
  {{ $json.unit_price_net }},
  '{{ $json.invoice_date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.unit }}',
  {{ $json.product_category ? "'" + $json.product_category + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'invoice_import',
  '{{ $json.invoice_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (supplier_id, sku) 
DO UPDATE SET
  last_price_net_eur = EXCLUDED.last_price_net_eur,
  last_price_date = EXCLUDED.last_price_date,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id::text;

parameters.query:
-- Step 1: Try to find supplier by alias
WITH alias_match AS (
  SELECT s.id, s.supplier_code, s.default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers s
  JOIN supplier_aliases sa ON sa.supplier_id = s.id
  WHERE LOWER(sa.alias_name) = LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}')
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 2: Try to find by short_name or code
name_match AS (
  SELECT id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers
  WHERE (
    LOWER(short_name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR LOWER(name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR supplier_code = '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}'
  )
  AND is_active = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 3: Create new if not found
new_supplier AS (
  INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_code, name, short_name, supplier_type, default_expense_category, is_active)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_typ }}'::supplier_type,
    '{{ $json.expense_category }}'::expense_category,
    true
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM name_match)
  ON CONFLICT (supplier_code) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
)
-- Return the matched or created supplier
SELECT 
  COALESCE(am.id, nm.id, ns.id)::text AS supplier_id,
  COALESCE(am.supplier_code, nm.supplier_code, ns.supplier_code) AS supplier_code,
  COALESCE(am.default_expense_category, nm.default_expense_category, ns.default_expense_category) AS default_expense_category,
  CASE 
    WHEN am.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'alias_match'
    WHEN nm.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'name_match'
    ELSE 'created'
  END AS match_type
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN alias_match am ON true
LEFT JOIN name_match nm ON true
LEFT JOIN new_supplier ns ON true;
